% Auto-generated by maxionbench.reports.portable_exports.
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\scriptsize
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{2pt}
\caption{Engine index/search and flush semantics for the reported matrix.}
\label{tab:engine-search-semantics}
\resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{%
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\toprule
Engine & Index/search & Process model & Flush/commit \\
\midrule
faiss-cpu & index\_type=flat (exact IndexFlatIP); search\_sweep recorded but ignored by flat index; top\_k=10 & Python process-local adapter & staged writes become visible after flush\_or\_commit rebuild/update \\
lancedb-inproc & default LanceDB table search; adapter does not create a secondary index; search\_sweep recorded but not consumed by adapter; top\_k=10 & Python in-process library with local LanceDB URI & staged writes become visible after flush\_or\_commit \\
lancedb-service & default adapter configuration & external HTTP service contract & depends on service implementation; no passing local row \\
pgvector & index\_method=ivfflat (adapter default); search\_sweep=[\{"ivfflat\_probes": 32\}, \{"ivfflat\_probes": 64\}]; top\_k=10 & PostgreSQL server plus Python adapter & writer transaction commit; readers observe committed state \\
qdrant & search\_sweep=[\{"hnsw\_ef": 32\}, \{"hnsw\_ef": 64\}]; top\_k=10 & Qdrant server plus Python adapter & upsert/update/delete requests use wait=true \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}
\end{table}
